description: Run a Google Cloud SDK (`gcloud`) command with auth-context awareness and operation-class detection. Refuses destructive commands unless dryRun=false is explicit.

inputs.name: args
inputs.description: argv tail to pass to gcloud, e.g. ["compute", "instances", "list"]. The literal `gcloud` is prepended by the skill.

inputs.name: dryRun
inputs.description: If true (default), classifies + reports the command without executing. Set false to actually run.

inputs.name: timeoutSeconds
inputs.description: Hard cap on the gcloud call.

outputs.name: authenticated
outputs.description: True iff `gcloud auth list` shows an active account.

outputs.name: project
outputs.description: Current default project from `gcloud config get-value project`, or empty.

outputs.name: operationClass
outputs.description: read | mutate | destroy — classification of the requested command.

outputs.name: executed
outputs.description: True iff the command actually ran (dryRun=false and classification was acceptable).
